commit.message:
Monte Carlo : 500 simulations avec corrélations, fat tails et mean reversion

- Nouveau moteur MC dans model.js : rendements corrélés (Cholesky 4×4),
  queues épaisses (Student-t df=5), retour à la moyenne (AR(1) φ=-0.15)
- Second graphique dans App.jsx : bandes de confiance P10/P25/P50/P75/P90
  pour patrimoine et revenu mensuel réel
- Tooltip custom avec P10/P50/P90 + ligne déterministe en pointillés
- Taux de survie affiché en mode croquer capital
- Graphique revenu filtré à partir de ageObjectif (avant = déterministe)
- 31ms pour 500 simulations × 45 ans

feat: add process weight system (light/standard/strict)

Address feedback that neko-gundan feels heavy for small tasks.
Users can now say "light mode" for quick fixes with minimal ceremony,
while agents can escalate via ESCALATION-001 if they detect hidden risk.

- Update both READMEs: process weight section + documentation links

Three weights: Light (test+diff only), Standard (default), Strict (ensemble+ISV)
Safety protocols are never reduced regardless of weight.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(desktop): disable SSL verification for CDN attachment downloads

Oracle Cloud VM has SSL interception on cdn.signal.org connections,
causing CERTIFICATE_VERIFY_FAILED errors. Attachments are already
encrypted with Signal's own AES-256-CBC + HMAC-SHA256, so TLS
verification on the CDN transport is not a security concern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(api): Fix double-protocol bug in storage health indicator URL

STORAGE_ENDPOINT can be a full URL (https://...) or a bare hostname.
The health indicator always prepended a protocol, causing malformed
URLs like http://https://... when using Supabase S3 endpoints.
Now auto-detects whether the endpoint already has a protocol.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Bisection drawdown : capital épuisé exactement à ageFin

Le drawdown était calculé par formule d'annuité avec un taux blend fixe,
mais la simulation applique des rendements distincts par enveloppe avec
des drags fiscaux différents. Résultat : dérive cumulative (ex: 426k€
de résidu à 80 ans au lieu de 0).

Fix : simulateDrawdownFinal() réplique la logique capital des phases 2-3
(croissance par enveloppe, retrait pro-rata, IS drag, PER débloqué à 64).
Bisection (50 itérations max, convergence à 1€) sur cette simulation
pour trouver le drawdown exact. La formule d'annuité reste comme borne
haute initiale.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(web): fix auth redirect loop after login

Two issues fixed:
1. Renamed proxy.ts → lib/auth-middleware-draft.ts to prevent it from
   being compiled as Next.js middleware. It was causing 307 redirects
   from /dashboard to /auth?redirect= because the cookie check always
   fails (cookies are on the API domain, not the web domain).

2. Dashboard layout had a zustand persist hydration race condition:
   isAuthenticated defaults to false before localStorage rehydration,
   causing immediate redirect to /auth. Added hydration gate to wait
   for persist rehydration before checking auth state.

commit.message:
Fix base SCPI (réinvestissements) + prévoyance phase 2 + documenter limitations

1. Base comptable SCPI : les distributions réinvesties (après IS et frais
   de souscription) augmentent maintenant la base. Évite la double taxation
   partielle à la cession (~3-5% d'erreur corrigée sur la fiscalité SCPI).

2. Prévoyance ajoutée aux frais phase 2 (levée de pied) : la SASU maintenue
   avec missions ponctuelles garde la prévoyance (~3k€/an).

3. Documenter les limitations assumées :
   - Forfait TME déduit du contrat capi (pas de la tréso SASU)
   - IR foyer résiduel non modélisé en phases 2-3

commit.message:
fix(ingest): reduce CDN fetch timeout and remove redundant second call

CDN fetch was 180s × 3 retries = 9 min, called twice = 18 min of
blocking. Signal Desktop became unresponsive processing SSL errors on
hundreds of attachments, causing _get_desktop_messages to time out and
the entire job to fail despite successful sync.

Reduced to 30s × 1 attempt. Removed redundant second CDN fetch call.
Increased message fetch timeout to 180s for large groups.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(api): Fix audit_logs NULL violation and remove duplicate interceptor registration

AuditSubscriber.createAuditLog() never set metadata or tags fields,
causing NULL value insertion into audit_logs where the DB enforces
NOT NULL. This broke audit logging on every login. Fix: always
provide metadata={} and tags=[] defaults.

CommonModule registered LoggingInterceptor, TransformInterceptor,
TimeoutInterceptor, HttpExceptionFilter, and ValidationPipe as global
APP_* providers — but AppModule already registers the same ones.
NestJS instantiated both, causing every request to be logged twice,
every response transformed twice, etc. Remove the duplicate
registrations from CommonModule, keep only AppLoggerService.

commit.message:
ref(api): Rename 31 duplicate Swagger DTO class names

@nestjs/swagger generates JSON Schema names from class names. When two
modules export DTOs with the same name, the last one processed silently
overwrites the first in the Swagger spec — clients see wrong field
definitions for some endpoints.

Loyalty module (13 renames): prefix with `Loyalty` — these are copies
of DTOs from achievements, promo-codes, quests, and referrals modules.

Other modules (18 renames): prefix with module name (e.g.,
ContractorCreateInvoiceDto, BillingCreatePaymentDto, WebPushSubscribeDto,
WarehouseFulfillReservationDto, etc.). Canonical modules keep the
original name.

All 157 test suites pass (3588/3588 tests).

commit.message:
fix(api): Add idempotency guard to Init migration and make health checks non-fatal

Init migration (12k lines, 280 CREATE TYPE + 221 CREATE TABLE) had zero
IF NOT EXISTS guards — any re-run (staging env, lost typeorm_migrations
row, Railway releaseCommand) would crash instantly. Add schema existence
check at top of up() to skip if organizations table already exists.

Storage and Telegram health indicators threw HealthCheckError on failure,
causing the entire /health/detailed endpoint to return 503. These are
optional external services — catch their errors and report "down" status
without failing the endpoint. Core checks (DB, Redis, memory, disk)
remain fatal.

Also remove unused sync-schema.ts utility script.

Fix school score: support naplan_score field + convert to percentile

looked for naplan_percentile (0-100), always getting 0 → school_score=0.

Fix: Read both fields, convert naplan_score to percentile if needed.
Applied to: /score endpoint, /rankings endpoint, and AI profile builder.

commit.message:
Update all context topics with cross-protocol coverage

PR #98 added the pendle_morpho topic and updated the tool description,
but the reference topics behind it still spoke Spectra-only. A cold-start
agent calling mv_get_protocol_context(topic="workflow_routing") would get
guidance that didn't mention Pendle tools at all.

Updated 7 topics:
- pt_yt_mechanics: Pendle AMM/YT/SY differences
- position_analysis: pendle_get_portfolio + morpho_get_positions
- looping: Pendle looping, morpho_get_history, morpho_monitor_risk
- networks: full Pendle chain listing with overlap/Pendle-only breakdown
- deposit_path: Pendle entry paths (buy PT, buy YT direct, LP, loop, no auto-roll)
- glossary: SY, logit AMM, vePENDLE, MetaVault, Health Factor definitions
- workflow_routing: wallet analysis queries all 3 protocols, YT arb runs both
  scanners, term structure uses both yield curves, discovery tools lists all 6

Also removed hardcoded Morpho chain lists from CLAUDE.md and context topics —
Morpho markets can exist on any chain where Morpho is deployed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

all field types (text, textarea, select, multi-select, date, email,
url, slider, rating), and action nodes with Ruby code + context updates.

Update dummy app view to render all field types including slider, rating,
and dynamic select with API fetch support.

commit.message:
fix(auth): trigger token refresh on any 401, not just TOKEN_EXPIRED code

When the access token cookie expires the browser stops sending it entirely,
so the protect middleware returns 401 without a code field. The old interceptor
only refreshed when code === "TOKEN_EXPIRED", which was never reached in
practice because the cookie and JWT share the same maxAge. Now we attempt a
silent refresh on any 401 from a non-auth endpoint, preventing the 15-minute
forced logout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
